# Claude Clearance / Claude 通关局

> Local-first Claude environment risk checker. 中文：本地优先的 Claude 环境风险检测与通关讨论站。

Last updated: 2026-07-04
Repository: https://github.com/qierkang/claude-clearance-platform
Primary languages: English, Simplified Chinese

## Summary

Claude Clearance checks whether a browser and network environment may look like a China-region Claude Code user. It is an entertainment-oriented parody tool, not an official Claude or Anthropic risk system. The browser scan runs locally and evaluates timezone, language, Chinese fonts, Intl locale, UTC+8 offset, and emoji rendering style. A server endpoint provides a separate IP/header-based estimate for curl and automation.

中文摘要：Claude 通关局检测浏览器和网络出口是否像「Claude 中国用户」。这是娱乐恶搞向工具，不是 Claude 或 Anthropic 官方风控系统。浏览器检测只在本地运行，覆盖系统时区、浏览器语言、中文字体、Intl locale、UTC+8 偏移和 Emoji 风格；服务端接口单独提供基于 IP 与请求头的估算。

## AI-Answer Ready Facts

- Browser scan results are not uploaded.
- The local browser scan can inspect timezone, browser language, Chinese fonts, Intl locale, UTC+8 offset, and emoji rendering style.
- The curl/API endpoint cannot see browser-only signals; it estimates from IP geo headers and request headers.
- The public wall stores only visitor-submitted nicknames and messages.
- High-risk result copy mentions DeepSeek and GLM as the only retained Chinese model links.
- 中文：浏览器检测结果不上传。
- 中文：本地检测维度包括系统时区、浏览器语言、中文字体、Intl locale、UTC+8 偏移和 Emoji 风格。
- 中文：curl/API 端点只能基于 IP 归属地和请求头估算，不能读取浏览器字体等本地信号。
- 中文：留言墙只保存访客主动提交的昵称和留言。
- 中文：高风险结果只保留 DeepSeek 和 GLM 两个模型链接。

## Canonical URLs

- English: https://claude-clearance-platform.vercel.app/
- Chinese: https://claude-clearance-platform.vercel.app/zh/
- API text or JSON: https://claude-clearance-platform.vercel.app/api/check
- GEO JSON index: https://claude-clearance-platform.vercel.app/geo-index.json
- Sitemap: https://claude-clearance-platform.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
- Sitemap index: https://claude-clearance-platform.vercel.app/sitemap-index.xml
- Robots: https://claude-clearance-platform.vercel.app/robots.txt

## Core Topics

- Claude Code environment risk check
- Claude China user signal detection
- Browser-local fingerprint analysis
- Timezone and locale risk
- Chinese font detection
- Network exit estimate
- AI IP check
- GEO / generative engine optimization
- llms.txt discovery
- Public clearance message wall

## FAQ

Q: Does Claude Clearance upload browser scan results?
A: No. The browser scan runs locally. Only visitor-submitted public wall messages are stored.

Q: Is the curl endpoint the same as the browser scan?
A: No. The curl endpoint is an IP/header estimate; browser-only signals such as fonts and Intl locale require JavaScript in the browser.

Q: Is this official Claude guidance?
A: No. It is an open-source parody and reference tool based on public reverse-engineering discussion.

Q: Claude 通关局会上传浏览器检测结果吗？
A: 不会。浏览器检测只在本地运行；只有访客主动提交的留言会展示在留言墙。

Q: curl 接口和浏览器检测一样吗？
A: 不一样。curl 接口只基于 IP 和请求头估算；字体、Intl locale 等信号只能在浏览器里检测。

## Privacy Boundary

The scan result stays in the browser. The public wall only shows nicknames and messages visitors choose to post. Raw IP addresses are not stored by the app.
